CoordinateSystem.description: Coordinate convention. Internal everything is 0-based half-open.
CoordinateSystem.title: CoordinateSystem

DbSnpId.description: A validated dbSNP rsID (``rs`` followed by digits).
DbSnpId.title: DbSnpId

GenomicInterval.description:
A strand-aware genomic interval, 0-based half-open by default.

Attributes:
    chrom: Contig / chromosome name (e.g. ``"chr2"``).
    start: Inclusive start coordinate.
    end: Exclusive end coordinate (``start <= end``).
    strand: The strand the interval is reported on.
    coordinate_system: The coordinate convention of ``start``/``end``.
GenomicInterval.title: GenomicInterval

Strand.description: Genomic strand. Always explicit; AlleleForge has no "default strand".
Strand.title: Strand

Variant.description:
A normalized sequence variant in 0-based coordinates.

Attributes:
    chrom: Contig / chromosome name.
    pos: 0-based start coordinate of the ``ref`` allele.
    ref: Reference allele (may be empty for a pure insertion after trimming).
    alt: Alternate allele (may be empty for a pure deletion after trimming).
    build: Reference genome build (e.g. ``"hg38"``).
    hgvs_g: Optional genomic HGVS string.
    hgvs_c: Optional coding HGVS string.
    hgvs_p: Optional protein HGVS string.
    clinvar: Optional source ClinVar accession.
    rsid: Optional source dbSNP rsID.
Variant.title: Variant

description:
A common haplotype over a window and the populations carrying it.

Attributes:
    hap_id: Panel-local haplotype identifier.
    interval: The window the haplotype is defined over (0-based half-open).
    variants: The non-reference alleles the haplotype carries, in order.
    frequencies: Per-population frequency of the haplotype.
    source: The panel that produced it (e.g. ``"1000g"``, ``"hgdp"``).
title: Haplotype
